content: AI sales copilots (Gong, Cresta, Attention, Balto, Chorus, Avoma) converge on: conversation capture + transcription, live or on-demand AI guidance, post-conversation summaries, AI scorecards graded against a sales methodology (MEDDIC/Challenger/custom rubrics), action items, CRM auto-updates, coaching dashboards. Real-time live coaching is the premium tier (200-400ms lag leaders); post-call scoring/analysis is the widespread standard. Manager side: scorecards with targeted feedback on specific moments, topic/objection tracking, talk ratio, leaderboards, trend tracking of conversion rates.
